Home / Service Areas / Roswell

Electrical contractor in Roswell, GA

Trusted local professionals serving Roswell and surrounding communities

Serving Roswell, GA

1st Generation Electric LLC is dedicated to serving the electrical needs of Roswell, GA, a city known for its upscale subdivisions developed in the 1980s and 90s. We offer a full range of services, including new construction wiring, electrical upgrades, and troubleshooting. Roswell's residents can rely on us for prompt and professional service, especially critical during the hot and humid summer months when electrical systems are heavily used.

Roswell is known for its beautiful neighborhoods, excellent schools, and thriving business environment, creating a high demand for quality electrical services.

Electrical contractor Services in Roswell

Electrical Repair Services

Fast, reliable electrical repairs for homes and businesses in Atlanta.

Learn more →

Electrical Installation Services

Professional electrical installations for new construction and remodeling projects.

Lighting Solutions & Installation

Enhance your home or business with custom lighting design and installation.

Learn more →

Electrical Panel Upgrades

Upgrade your outdated electrical panel for increased safety and capacity.

Learn more →

Whole-Home Surge Protection

Protect your valuable electronics from damaging power surges.

Learn more →

Electric Vehicle (EV) Charger Installation

Expert installation of EV chargers for convenient home charging.

Learn more →
